hardware.notes: This is an execution-stack validation claim. The current IBM concurrence and negativity values are reconstructed through a simulation-side proxy model and should not be read as a direct hardware-side adaptive-advantage result.
hardware.statement: The published IBM aggregate confirms execution of the qubit-native weak-measurement workflow on ibm_torino across 18 completed configurations, 2052 total IBM jobs, and 108 aggregate metric rows.

simulation.notes: Computed by scanning the committed shot ladder per (seed, state_id) and recording the first shot where abs_err_c <= 0.05.
simulation.statement: Across the 35-run simulation matrix, adaptive IG reaches |Ĉ-C| <= 0.05 at a median shot budget of 128.0, versus 512.0 for the fixed-particle baseline (fixed/adaptive ratio=4.00).

simulation.notes: Coverage is evaluated on the simulation test rows using the published ci90 interval columns against c_true.
simulation.statement: In the headline simulation aggregate, adaptive IG attains empirical 90% coverage of 0.976; the fixed-particle baseline attains 0.936.
